---
title: "PhillyStat360 — 04h: Block CV by census tract (R port)"
output: html_document
---

R port of `code/python/04h_block_cv_rf.ipynb`. Re-runs the production RF with
`group_vfold_cv` blocked by `census_tract`.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libs}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(rsample)
  library(ranger)
  library(yardstick)
})

ROOT       <- here::here()
DATA_PATH  <- file.path(ROOT, "data")
PY_PATH    <- file.path(ROOT, "data_py")
OUT_PATH   <- PY_PATH
GRAPH_PATH <- file.path(ROOT, "graphs", "python")
dir.create(GRAPH_PATH, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
SEED <- 42
```

## 1. Load training data

```{r load}
rf_existing <- readRDS(file.path(PY_PATH, "model_rf_final.rds"))
X_cols <- rf_existing$forest$independent.variable.names
cat("Features:", length(X_cols), "\n")

feat <- read_csv(file.path(DATA_PATH, "features_residential.csv"),
                 show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number))) |>
  filter(!is.na(ovs), !is.na(census_tract)) |>
  mutate(census_tract = as.integer(census_tract))

cat("Rows:", nrow(feat),
    " tracts:", n_distinct(feat$census_tract),
    " prevalence:", mean(feat$ovs), "\n")
```

## 2. RF hyperparameters from production fit

```{r rf-params}
RF_TREES <- rf_existing$num.trees
RF_MTRY  <- rf_existing$mtry
RF_MIN_N <- rf_existing$min.node.size

n_neg <- sum(feat$ovs == 0); n_pos <- sum(feat$ovs == 1)
spw <- n_neg / max(n_pos, 1)

fit_rf_block <- function(train_data) {
  d <- train_data |>
    select(all_of(X_cols), ovs) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric),
                  \(x) replace_na(x, median(x, na.rm = TRUE))),
           ovs_factor = factor(ovs, levels = c(0, 1),
                               labels = c("not_vacant", "vacant"))) |>
    select(-ovs)
  ranger(ovs_factor ~ ., data = d,
         num.trees = RF_TREES, mtry = RF_MTRY, min.node.size = RF_MIN_N,
         probability = TRUE,
         class.weights = c(not_vacant = 1, vacant = spw),
         seed = SEED, num.threads = parallel::detectCores())
}

predict_rf_block <- function(fit, data) {
  d <- data |> select(all_of(X_cols)) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric),
                  \(x) replace_na(x, median(x, na.rm = TRUE))))
  predict(fit, data = d)$predictions[, "vacant"]
}
```

## 3. Block CV (5 folds by census tract)

```{r block-cv}
folds <- group_vfold_cv(feat, group = census_tract, v = 5)

fold_results <- map2_dfr(folds$splits, seq_along(folds$splits), \(s, i) {
  tr <- analysis(s); te <- assessment(s)
  fit <- fit_rf_block(tr)
  p <- predict_rf_block(fit, te)
  auc <- as.numeric(yardstick::roc_auc_vec(
    factor(te$ovs, levels = c(1, 0)), p, event_level = "first"))
  cat(sprintf("Fold %d: AUC=%.4f (train=%d, test=%d)\n",
              i, auc, nrow(tr), nrow(te)))
  tibble(fold = i,
         n_train = nrow(tr), n_test = nrow(te),
         n_train_tracts = n_distinct(tr$census_tract),
         n_test_tracts  = n_distinct(te$census_tract),
         pos_test = sum(te$ovs == 1),
         auc = auc)
})

cat(sprintf("\nMean AUC: %.4f (sd %.4f)\n",
            mean(fold_results$auc), sd(fold_results$auc)))
write_csv(fold_results, file.path(OUT_PATH, "block_cv_rf.csv"))
```

## 4. Compare to random-split AUC

```{r compare}
preds <- read_csv(file.path(PY_PATH, "predictions_04b.csv"),
                  col_select = c("parcel_number", "ovs", "data_split",
                                 "ensemble_prob"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE)
test <- preds |> filter(data_split == "test")
random_auc <- as.numeric(yardstick::roc_auc_vec(
  factor(test$ovs, levels = c(1, 0)),
  test$ensemble_prob, event_level = "first"))

cat(sprintf("Random-split (ensemble): AUC = %.4f\n", random_auc))
cat(sprintf("Block-CV (RF):           AUC = %.4f ± %.4f\n",
            mean(fold_results$auc), sd(fold_results$auc)))
cat(sprintf("Drop: %+.4f\n",
            random_auc - mean(fold_results$auc)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
bp <- ggplot(fold_results, aes(factor(fold), auc)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1f77b4") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = random_auc, linetype = "dashed", color = "tomato") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(fold_results$auc),
             linetype = "dotted", color = "#1f77b4") +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(title = "Block CV by census tract — held-out AUC per fold",
       x = "Fold", y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "block_cv_rf_aucs.png"), bp,
       width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 200)
bp
```
